TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Singaw ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 119 buwan, 315 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 295 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 20 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 85%, saySiyat 7%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Singaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Singaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Singaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Singaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Singaw hya' ga Yohae'. tay 'llaw na Singaw hya' ga T'apan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕiŋaw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, truku *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕiŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕiŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕiŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕiŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕiŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa joħaeʔ. taj ʔllaw na s~ɕiŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa tʔapan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Singaw ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 119 buwan, 315 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 295 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 20 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 85%, saySiyat 7%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Singaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Singaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Singaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Singaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Singaw hya' ga Yohae'. tay 'llaw na Singaw hya' ga T'apan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕiŋaw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, truku *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕiŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕiŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕiŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕiŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕiŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa joħaeʔ. taj ʔllaw na s~ɕiŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa tʔapan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
